TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
215 
MRTL_STUS_CD 
LABEL: 
Marital Status Code — Latest in Year 
DESCRIPTION: A code to classify eligible beneficiary’s marital/domestic-relationship status; most recent in the 
calendar and the two prior years. 
SHORT NAME: MRTL_STUS_CD 
LONG NAME: MRTL_STUS_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
FILE(S): 
Annual DE base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF
